input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.3.1
            TITLE: the etc notice of intent:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.3.1: The ETC Notice of Intent:
IC.4.3.1 The ETC Notice of Intent:  
• Must be submitted to inform the organizer of the intent to run ETC 
• May be used to screen which teams are allowed to use ETC

final_answer: rule IC.4.3.1: The ETC Notice of Intent: IC.4.3.1 The ETC Notice of Intent: • Must be submitted to inform the organizer of the intent to run ETC • May be used to screen which teams are allowed to use ETC
